summary: Expose addCartItemV2 order-item IDs and store-scoped cart show for safer live cart debugging.
reason: The previous controlled live cart test returned a cart ID but no visible cart; the next approved test needs the exact added item ID when DoorDash returns it and a read-only store-scoped listCarts check before any removal/cleanup attempt.
validated_outcome: 2026-05-14T05:11Z: node --check passed for dist/api/cart.js and dist/cli.js; active CLI help shows cart show --store-id; cart add --dry-run returns safely; cart show --store-id 2418408 returns a list; doctor remains authenticated/csrf_present with consumer_id_present=false; cart add without --yes and order place without ALLOW_DOORDASH_ORDERING=1 both reject. No live mutation/order attempted.
